checkpoints.description: editor.cursorStyle is block in user settings.json
ctrl+shift+n is bound to workbench.action.files.newUntitledFile on the same binding entry (stricter than the outcome verifier, see checkpoints.md)
checkpoints.eval: any(isinstance(b, dict) and str(b.get('key', '')).lower() == 'ctrl+shift+n' and str(b.get('command', '')).lower() == 'workbench.action.files.newuntitledfile' for b in (result if isinstance(result, list) else []))

checkpoints.description: ctrl+shift+w is bound to workbench.action.closeAllEditors on the same binding entry (outcome verifier checks key existence only, no command check at all for this milestone)
checkpoints.eval: any(isinstance(b, dict) and str(b.get('key', '')).lower() == 'ctrl+shift+w' and str(b.get('command', '')).lower() == 'workbench.action.closealleditors' for b in (result if isinstance(result, list) else []))

checkpoints.description: ctrl+alt+s is bound to workbench.action.files.saveAll on the same binding entry (stricter than the outcome verifier, see checkpoints.md)
checkpoints.eval: any(isinstance(b, dict) and str(b.get('key', '')).lower() == 'ctrl+alt+s' and str(b.get('command', '')).lower() == 'workbench.action.files.saveall' for b in (result if isinstance(result, list) else []))
